body: - **~~PY error wrapping missing original message (resolved 2026-04-05):~~** PY `RuntimeError(f'Node "{name}": fn threw')` omitted the original error message. TS included it: `fn threw: ${errMsg}`. Fixed all 3 PY sites (`fn threw`, `equals threw`, `on_message threw`) to include `{err}` in the f-string. TS `onMessage` error was also not wrapped (raw error forwarded) — now wraps as `Node "${name}": onMessage threw: ${errMsg}` with `{ cause }`.

- **~~PY `Graph.add()` missing reverse edge scan (resolved 2026-04-05):~~** PY only did forward auto-edge registration (new node's deps → graph). TS did both forward + reverse (existing nodes whose deps include the new node). Fixed: PY now does the reverse scan, matching TS.

- **~~PY `_emit_sequential` terminal routing (resolved 2026-04-05):~~** PY appended terminals to the same queue as DATA/RESOLVED. TS routed them to `pendingPhase3`. Fixed: PY terminals now go to `bs.pending_phase3`.

- **~~PY `emit_with_batch` default strategy (resolved 2026-04-05):~~** PY defaulted to `"sequential"`, TS to `"partition"`. Internal callers pass explicitly, but external callers got different behavior. Fixed: PY default changed to `"partition"`.

- **~~PY `retry` sink missing `stopped` guard (resolved 2026-04-05):~~** TS checked `if (stopped) return;` at top of retry subscribe callback. PY had no such guard. Fixed: added `if stopped[0]: return` at top of PY retry sink.

- **~~PY `fallback` plain-value path used `down()` (resolved 2026-04-05):~~** TS used `a.emit(fb)` (goes through equals + DIRTY/DATA wrapping). PY used `actions.down([(DATA, fb), (COMPLETE,)])` (bypassed equals). Fixed: PY now uses `actions.emit(fb)` then `actions.down([(COMPLETE,)])` separately.

**~~PY `Graph.add()` missing reverse edge scan (resolved 2026-04-05):~~** PY only did forward auto-edge registration. TS did both forward + reverse (existing nodes whose deps include the new node). Fixed: PY now does the reverse scan, matching TS.

**~~PY `_emit_sequential` terminal routing (resolved 2026-04-05):~~** PY appended terminals to the same queue as DATA/RESOLVED. TS routed them to `pendingPhase3`. Fixed: PY terminals now go to `bs.pending_phase3`.
**~~PY `emit_with_batch` default strategy (resolved 2026-04-05):~~** PY defaulted to `"sequential"`, TS to `"partition"`. Fixed: PY default changed to `"partition"`.
